productName: Honey Stixx - 2Pk - HTE Batter - Bubba Kush X Northern Lights - Indica
description: Ready-to-spark indica infused pre-roll of Bubba Kush, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of coffee, earthy, and pungent, with deep, easygoing relaxation. A little goes a long way.
